modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Accommodations not working or no longer needed.

full_description_text: So, the person called in. They said the accommodations ain't working. Or maybe they don't need them anymore? Just kinda confused about the whole thing.
short_description: Accommodations not working or no longer needed.
description: So, the person called in. They said the accommodations ain't working. Or maybe they don't need them anymore? Just kinda confused about the whole thing.
